# viettelidc_ovpc_key_pair (Resource)

ViettelIDC Key Pair — SSH key pair for VM access.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `key_name` (String) Key pair name.

### Optional

- `vpc_id` (String) VPC ID. Falls back to provider default when unset.

### Read-Only

- `download_url` (String, Sensitive) URL to download the private key file. Available immediately after creation.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
